title: Dynamic Typing & Type Inspection Cheat Sheet

entries.description: Returns the exact class type of the object.
Checks if object is an instance of class or subclass.
entries.commonMistake: Passing a list `[str, int]` instead of a tuple `(str, int)`.

entries.description: Converts any object into string representation.
entries.commonMistake: Concatenating string with integer without calling `str()`.
